goal: Phase 2 source/catalog snapshot model for Orun (component catalog)
next_focus: Implement C4 PR-2: WriteRefs (refs/{current,latest,main,branches/<x>,prs/<n>} via CompareAndSwap), WriteGlobalIndexes, AppendComponentEvent with seq.lock retry-up-to-16. Add ErrRefStale to error taxonomy. Replace the three deferred ErrNotImplemented stubs and update TestStubsReturnErrNotImplemented. New files: internal/catalogstore/{refs.go, refs_test.go, indexes.go, indexes_test.go}. DO NOT touch resolver.go / RebuildIndexes / fallback chain (those belong to PR-3). Hold internal/catalogstore coverage ≥90 %; target ≥91 % to keep buffer.
notes: Phase 2 Milestone C4 PR-1 ✅ shipped via PR #173 (squash c2d7b9d) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogstore greenfielded with paths.go (every helper from catalog-store.md §2 + ValidateSegment/ValidateRefName/ValidateGraphKind, no os/io/ioutil/path/filepath imports), errors.go (typed ErrSourceMismatch/ErrCatalogMismatch/ErrManifestMismatch double-wrapping statestore.ErrExists via fmt.Errorf("%w: %w", …) so errors.Is succeeds against both targets, plus ErrInputsInconsistent pre-flight sentinel and ErrNotImplemented wrapping errors.ErrUnsupported), writer.go (WriteSourceSnapshot step A + WriteCatalogSnapshot steps B.1 manifests → B.2 graphs (driven by CatalogGraphKinds() in fixed dependencies/systems/apis/resources/owners order, NOT map iteration) → B.3 catalog.json → B.4 local indexes via plain Write, with preflightCatalogInputs running BEFORE any state mutation), store.go (Writer/Resolver/Store interfaces + compile-time var _ assertions + typed ErrNotImplemented stubs for WriteRefs/WriteGlobalIndexes/AppendComponentEvent and all Resolver methods). Body writes use catalogmodel.PrettyEncode; CanonicalEncode reserved for hashing in PR-2/PR-3. Spy-based call-order test asserts B.1→B.2→B.3→B.4 and graph order regardless of input map order. TestStubsReturnErrNotImplemented pins all 8 deferred surfaces. Coverage on main: catalogstore 90.7%; Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte (statestore 95.7, revision 90.3, executionstate 90.0); Phase 2 floors held (catalogmodel 91.1, sourcectx 91.1, catalogresolve 90.9). Verifier report: ai/reports/task-0031-verifier.md (relocated implementer report from non-canonical reports/ to ai/reports/task-0030-implementer.md as part of merge cleanup).

Phase 2 Milestone C3 ✅ shipped via PR #172 (squash 75082ca) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogresolve gained BuildCatalog(ctx, opts, ResolverInputs) (*CatalogView, []ValidationIssue, error) wiring resolution-pipeline.md §1 stages 11 (graph build) → 12 (catalogHash per identity-and-keys §9) → 13 (snapshot assemble + key derive + Source-block back-fill). Five CatalogGraph siblings (dependencies/systems/apis/resources/owners) with sorted nodes-by-key and edges-by-(from,to,type,optional). Three new sibling files (graph.go, catalog_hash.go, catalog_snapshot.go) + their test files; convention from C2 PR-1 honoured (no edits to existing source files). T-IDK-1 (rapid 1000 orderings → identical hash) green; deterministic backstops for owner-edit propagation, provenance-only stability, two-call byte-identical determinism, summary sorted-distinct counts, catalogSnapshotKey ^cat-[a-f0-9]{6,16}$, and ErrResolverInputsIncomplete missing-field rejection. Source-block back-fill (sourceSnapshotKey/catalogSnapshotKey/headRevision/treeHash/workingTree) happens AFTER manifestHash is finalised at C2 stage 10 — manifestHash excludes the entire Source block from its hashed payload (hash.go), so back-fill is invariant-safe. Coverage on main: catalogresolve 90.2 → 90.9 (+0.7pp); catalogmodel 91.1, sourcectx 91.1, Sanitize* 100; Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte (statestore 95.7, revision 90.3, executionstate 90.0). Verifier report: ai/reports/task-0029-verifier.md.

Phase 2 Milestone C0 ✅ shipped via PR #168 (squash 7f3f2bf) on 2026-05-31. internal/catalogmodel + sourcectx skeleton, canonical encoder, JSON Schema generator + verify-generated drift gate, golden roundtrip, T-IDK-1/3/5 property tests. Verifier hardened Makefile with package-level ≥90% gates after spotting an 81.7% catalogmodel ship.

Phase 2 Milestone C1 ✅ shipped via PR #169 (squash b50d799) on 2026-05-31. internal/sourcectx resolver online — ResolveSourceSnapshot(ctx, opts) populates headRevision/treeHash/dirtyHash/catalogInputHash via injected Git/Clock/Filesystem adapters. Verifier-attached fix: TestCanonicalEncodeStringEscapeBranches in internal/catalogmodel/coverage_test.go pinned the C0 catalogmodel coverage floor deterministically (rapid-driven property tests were probabilistically missing \b/\f escape branches in writeQuotedString, dropping coverage from 90.2% to 87.9% on some seeds). Post-fix coverage on main: catalogmodel 91.1%, sourcectx 91.1%, Sanitize* 100%; Phase 1 floors held.

Phase 2 Milestone C2 ✅ CLOSED. PR-1 (Task 0025 / PR #170, squash 723be32) shipped DiscoverAndLoad on 2026-05-31. PR-2 (Task 0026 / PR #171, squash 74b88e0) shipped top-level Resolve(ctx, opts) (*ResolvedCatalog, []ValidationIssue, error) covering resolution-pipeline stages 4 (infer) / 5+6 (validate) / 7 (assemble) / 8 (deps) / 9 (validate post-deps) / 10 (manifestHash) on 2026-05-31T08:36:04Z. Coverage floors on main: catalogresolve 90.2% (+0.2pp headroom), catalogmodel 91.1%, sourcectx 91.1%, Sanitize* 100%; Phase 1 floors held byte-for-byte (statestore 95.7, revision 90.3, executionstate 90.0). T-RES-1 (determinism), T-RES-2 (provenance completeness), ErrDependencyMissing (both endpoints), deploy-after cycle = error always, calls cycle = warn default / error strict, manifestHash provenance-exclusion property all proven by deterministic tests. Errors-typed surface (ErrDuplicateComponent, ErrDependencyMissing, ErrCycle, ErrInferenceFailed) with errors.Is/errors.As compat. Convention adopted in C2 PR-1 (one additive sibling file per cross-package contract surface in catalogmodel/sourcectx, no edits to existing source files) honoured cleanly — C2 PR-2 introduced no new files in those packages.
Task 0027 verifier PASS on 2026-05-31. Squash-merged PR #171 at 74b88e0; branch task-0026-catalogresolve-c2-pr2 deleted. Verifier report: ai/reports/task-0027-verifier.md. C2 closed.

C3+ roadmap: C3 (next) = CatalogSnapshot + graph builder + catalogHash; C4 = catalogstore Writer/Resolver atomic writes; C5 = catalog CLI; C6 = orun plan integration; C7 = orun run integration + history events; C8 = catalogdiff/validate/rebuild; C9 = catalogsync seam (Syncer interface + NoopSyncer ONLY — no HTTP, no auth, no DB schema).
Phase 2 is local-only. No HTTP, no SaaS, no DB schema. internal/catalogsync ships only the Syncer interface and a NoopSyncer.
Phase 1 invariants preserved: do not rename Phase 1 fields, do not lower coverage floors, do not remove preserved CLI workflows.

Carry-forward (deferred from Phase 1, candidates for follow-on within Phase 2 scope): MirrorModeHardlink debug-fold decision, RunnerHooks.AfterStateUpdate async-mirror evaluation, --persist-revision flag wiring, Option B trigger-name resolver branch (ai/proposals/task-0019-spec-update.md), --prune-legacy.
